lines: Nubwo nd' umwana muto bwose, Jye nd' agatama ka Yesu; Mbasha no kwinjira mw irembo Rijya mu Bwami bw'Imana.
Njye nshyira neza, (X 2) Murokozi, Kwizera kwanjye ( x 2) Muri Wowe.
Nubwo nd' umwana muto bwose, Yesu, war' umeze nkanjye; Umwuka wawe n'
ump' ubwenge, Ni bwo nzasa nawe rwose.
Nubwo nd' umwana muto bwose, Nsa n'urum' iyo hakeye; Yesu ni we
Jye ndi muto; ndacyari mw isi, Mfit' ubugingo bugufi : Mukiz' ubwawe n'
